title: Keeru: The Unwritten Chapters
author: Keerthi D. C.
description: A fictional story about a computer science student chasing dreams, surviving deadlines, and believing that every challenge is just another chapter before success.

title: Internshala Assignment Survival Guide
author: 100/100 Evaluator
description: A practical guide to completing React assignments. Rumour says anyone who finishes this assignment deserves 100/100. If you're reading this, dear evaluator... maybe the rumour is true. 😄

title: Keeru in the Future
author: AI from 2050
description: A science fiction adventure where Keeru builds intelligent applications, travels through time to fix bugs before they happen, and proves that semicolons can save the universe.

title: Wings of Fire
author: A. P. J. Abdul Kalam
description: The inspiring autobiography of Dr. A. P. J. Abdul Kalam, sharing his journey from a small town to becoming the President of India.

title: The White Tiger
author: Aravind Adiga
description: A gripping novel that explores ambition, society, and the journey of a man determined to change his destiny.

title: Ignited Minds
author: A. P. J. Abdul Kalam
description: An inspiring book encouraging young people to dream big, work hard, and contribute to the nation's development.
